Description: Cracking contraptions
Place and push a button
Flick a lever
Step on a pressure plate
Use a pressure plate to craft a detector rail
Dinner time!
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Heavy (iron) Weighted Pressure Plate

Description: Dine in style! (No, not really)
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Light (gold) Weighted Pressure Plate

Description: Place a line of string between two tripwire hooks, and trigger it
Actual Requirements: Stand on an attached line of tripwire that has not been defused

Description: Trigger a trapped chest. Good for trolling your friends!
Craft and place a redstone torch
Craft a redstone repeater for delaying signals
Mine Nether Quartz from the Nether
Craft a redstone comparator
Read the power signal of a Chiseled Bookshelf using a comparator
Actual Requirements: Place a comparator facing outwards from a Chiseled Bookshelf OR place a Chiseled Bookshelf behind a comparator

Description: Craft a daylight sensor
Craft an observer
Mine enough nether quartz to craft a stack of quartz blocks
Craft a hopper for item transportation
Craft a dropper for item transportation
Construct a dispenser
Have at least 100 of each type of Chicken Egg fired in the air at once within 48 blocks of you
Build a redstone machine that uses TNT to launch you at least 100 blocks into the stratosphere
Actual Requirements: An explosion from TNT must launch you at least 100 blocks upward

Description: Put up a Target for archery practise
Hit a Target with all types of projectiles
Actual Requirements: Hit a Target with the following projectiles:

Description: Hit the bullseye of a Target Block with an arrow from 30 blocks away
Actual Requirements: Output a signal strength of 15 on a Target using an arrow from 30 blocks away

Description: Craft a Crafter
Be near a Crafter when it crafts a Crafter
Be near a Crafter when it crafts a Dispenser 64 times
Craft a piston so you can push things
Craft a sticky piston so you can pull things
Craft all types of redstone component
Craft a stack of all types of redstone component
Craft a note block
Tune a Note Block through every possible note
Play every possible instrument on a Note Block
Actual Requirements: Play a Note Block that is on top of the following blocks:

Description: Play a Note Block in every type of biome
Actual Requirements: Play a Note Block in one biome from the following categories:

Description: Play Note Blocks with each type of mob head above it
Actual Requirements: Play a note block with a Zombie, Skeleton, Wither Skeleton, Creeper, Piglin and Dragon Head on top

Description: Craft and board a Minecart for railway journeys
Notes: Known as "On A Rail" until 1.13 Alpha Build 4

Description: Craft a Minecart with Furnace and use coal or charcoal to send it chugging
Actual Requirements: Use coal or charcoal on a Minecart with Furnace

Description: Put a chest in a minecart
Put a hopper in a minecart
Put TNT in a minecart
Making furnace minecarts completely useless
Craft a stack of all the different types of rails
Actual Requirements: Obtain 64 of each of Rails, Powered Rails, Detector Rails and Activator Rails

Description: Travel by Minecart in a straight line to at least 1 km from where you started
Use Silk Touch to pick up a Sculk Sensor or find one among Ancient City treasure
Notes: Hidden and in the Redstone tab until 1.14 Alpha Build 1

Description: Craft a Calibrated Sculk Sensor using Amethyst Shards
Use Silk Touch to pick up a Sculk Shrieker
Collect a stack of all sculk-related blocks
Actual Requirements: Collect a stack of: Sculk, Sculk Veins, Sculk Sensors, Sculk Catalysts, Sculk Shriekers and Calibrated Sculk Sensors

Description: Hold a Shulker Box that is completely filled with Sculk
Kill a Wither near a Sculk Catalyst to unleash a large explosion of sculk
Kill every hostile monster near a Sculk Catalyst
Actual Requirements: Same monsters as "Monsters Hunted" in the Monsters tab. Creaking and Ender Dragon are not required
